product_updates.title: Poke makes using AI agents as easy as sending a text
product_updates.content: Poke brings AI agents to everyday users via text message by handling tasks and automations without complex setup, apps, or technical know-how.

product_updates.title: AWS boss explains why investing billions in both Anthropic and OpenAI is an OK conflict
product_updates.content: AWS has an ingrained culture of handling competition, he explained, because the cloud giant also competes with its partners.

product_updates.title: Tubi is the first streamer to launch a native app within ChatGPT
product_updates.content: Tubi becomes the first streaming service to offer an app integration within ChatGPT, the AI chatbot that millions of users turn to for answers.

product_updates.title: Astropad’s Workbench reimagines remote desktop for AI agents, not IT support
product_updates.content: Astropad’s Workbench lets users remotely monitor and control AI agents on Mac Minis from iPhone or iPad, with low-latency streaming and mobile access.

product_updates.title: OpenAI releases a new safety blueprint to address the rise in child sexual exploitation
product_updates.content: OpenAI's new Child Safety Blueprint aims to tackle the alarming rise in child sexual exploitation linked to advancements in AI.

product_updates.title: Databricks co-founder wins prestigious ACM award, says ‘AGI is here already’
product_updates.content: Matei Zaharia has won the top honor from the Association for Computing Machinery. Now he's working on AI for research and says AGI is simply misunderstood.

product_updates.title: Final 3 days to save up to $500 on your TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 pass
product_updates.content: Save up to $500 on your TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 pass until April 10, 11:59 p.m. PT. Secure your spot at the center of the tech ecosystem. Register today.

product_updates.title: Atlassian launches visual AI tools and third-party agents in Confluence
product_updates.content: Confluence users can now create visual assets within the software in addition to new third-party agents working with Lovable, Replit, and Gamma.

product_updates.title: Google quietly launched an AI dictation app that works offline
product_updates.content: Google's new offline-first dictation app uses Gemma AI models to take on the apps like Wispr Flow.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Iran-linked hackers disrupt operations at US critical infrastructure sites
technical_breakthroughs.content: As the US and Israel's war has ramped up, so too have hacks on US industrial sites.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Mustafa Suleyman: AI development won’t hit a wall anytime soon—here’s why
technical_breakthroughs.content: We evolved for a linear world. If you walk for an hour, you cover a certain distance. Walk for two hours and you cover double that distance. This intuition served us well on the savannah. But it catastrophically fails when confronting AI and the core exponential trends at its heart. From the time…

technical_breakthroughs.title: The Download: water threats in Iran and AI’s impact on what entrepreneurs make
technical_breakthroughs.content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. technical_breakthroughs.title: Thousands of consumer routers hacked by Russia's military
technical_breakthroughs.content: End-of-life routers in homes and small offices hacked in 120 countries.
